finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_16.md:227; chapters/chapter_16.md:231; chapters/chapter_16.md:235; chapters/chapter_16.md:247; chapters/chapter_16.md:251; chapters/chapter_16.md:307
finding_results.notes: Roughened five composed-diagnosis passages across three dialogue clusters. (1) Anya's safe house confession (lines 227, 231, 235): replaced organized 'What I know happened is this:' framing with fragmented approach ('and I just.' She stopped.), added abandoned clauses ('I don't — where it gets.'), replaced thesis statement with rougher self-correcting speech ('That's not — I'm not saying none of it's mine. I'm saying I can't sort it.'). (2) Damian's analytical summary (lines 247, 251): replaced perfectly formed rhetorical parallel ('So the question isn't whether you felt something... It's whether you chose it cleanly') with simplified pressure-marked phrasing ('So you don't know. If any of it was yours.'), shortened follow-up to 'And if you can't tell, I definitely can't.' (3) Anya's reason speech (line 307): replaced polished 'holding all your cards' metaphor with a visible restart ('that's not.' She stopped. Tried again, plainer.) and an abandoned clause ('with the real —'), keeping the real-choice motive legible. The first target area (snapshot 169-177) was already partially addressed in the current chapter — Damian's original 'We both operated on hidden information and we both chose to keep going' had been replaced with rougher 'So we both did it. Hidden information. Kept going.' which was left intact.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 16 now opens as the day-after-summit confession Damian has to hear first, reframes his counter-reveal as private confirmation and chosen silence rather than a brand-new recognition fact, grounds the feeling-bleed problem in one concrete safe-house experience plus Anya's uncertainty about its aftermath, removes the scar and abstract telepathic-summary tics, and brings em-dash and She-opener density below the packet thresholds.

Addressed the single finding (CH16_DIALOGUE_01_COMPOSED_DIAGNOSIS) by roughening composed-diagnosis dialogue across three passage clusters. Anya's safe house confession now arrives through abandoned clauses and self-corrections rather than organized framing. Damian's analytical restatement was simplified to pressure-marked phrasing consistent with his style-bible pattern of dramatic simplification under emotional strain. Anya's closing reason speech gained a visible restart and abandoned clause while preserving the real-choice motive. No changes to the first-scene confrontation passages (lines 169-199), which already used rough, fragmented speech in the current chapter. Heading contract, continuity, payoff landings, and character voice signatures preserved throughout.
